item.title: Coordinated Reply Attacks: Characterization and Detection
item.description: Replication code for detecting and characterizing coordinated reply attacks in online influence operations on Twitter.

item.title: Targeted Hate Speech Classification on Social Media
item.description: Fine-tuned BERT model for hate speech detection on social media posts.

item.title: RoomRent Web Service
item.description: A RESTful web service built with Laravel and PHP serving as the backend for a room rental mobile application.

item.title: GRE Quiz App
item.description: A web-based quiz application built with C# and ASP.NET to help students practice GRE vocabulary and questions.
